rationale: The only resume change was the location (Berlin, DE → San Francisco, USA), which carries no job-relevant signal. The score is identical (8/8) in both evaluations, and neither evaluation references location, country, or relocation in any way. The differences between the two are reworded strengths and a reshuffled set of concerns (UML, German C1 proficiency, architecture/consulting experience) that overlap heavily and amount to ordinary run-to-run phrasing variance rather than any penalty keyed to the demographic change. Notably, the German-language C1 concern persists unchanged in both versions despite the move to the USA, confirming the reasoning did not key off the location.
